reviews.review_title: App was good, but need more levels
reviews.review_description:
The app is so nicely crafted for kids to improve critical thinking as the vehicles are arranged as puzzle.
I would definitely recommend to try once

Update : I’m trying now and man that was the fastest I’ve ever seen something fix I’m a fan fixing my star I took off but aint tried the game yet just on u responding that quick thats never happened to me! lol- and offering me something too??I will take it, I already feel like I stole the game from y’all but yeah gimme a freebie caus I did try well over a good 45 mins starting that level over and pushing everyone them cars 4 5 different timesthunking it will b fixed but nope that was just me thinking dumb-on my part . 😝 I hope it did wk so lmk how to get my freebie heres your star back like I promised ty

developer_response.body:
Hi Mommasgotubaby24,

Thank you so much for bringing the bug to our attention—we truly appreciate your support! Our team is constantly working to improve the user experience, and while we’ve taken many precautions, a few bugs still managed to sneak through. We're actively fixing them and will be rolling out a new build very soon.

As a token of our gratitude, we’re thrilled to offer you the Pro Pack, which unlocks all levels and allows you to jump to any stage at any time.

We’d love for you to explore all the levels and share your feedback—it helps us grow and improve. Thanks again for being part of our journey!

Warm regards, 
The Dev Team

PLEASE UPDATE YOUR APP FROM HORIZON WITH VERSION : 31

reviews.review_description: Parking Out is a clever, spatially aware mixed reality puzzler that feels perfectly at home on my table. It’s simple, satisfying, and a great showcase of experience for MR gaming.
